title: Records of Investigations of Unidentified Flying Objects (UFOs) Relating to the Office of Special Investigations

referenceUnits.name: National Archives at College Park - Textual Reference

accessRestriction.note: The records may be restricted due to privacy concerns.

arrangement: Arranged in three parts.  The first part is arranged by case file number and thereunder chronologically.  The second part is arranged by district and overseas commands and thereunder chronologically.  The third part consists of photographs pulled from the second part and arranged by case number.

microformPublications.note: This series can be found on microfilm roll numbers 88-94 of T1206.
microformPublications.title: T1206 - Project 'Bluebook.', 1947-1969.

contributors.heading: Department of Defense. Department of the Air Force. Office of the Inspector General. Air Force Office of Special Investigations. (8/1/1948 - )

otherTitles: Reports Of Investigations Of Unidentified Flying Objects

ancestors.title: Records of Headquarters U.S. Air Force (Air Staff)

scopeAndContentNote: This series consists of investigative reports, correspondence, and photographs relating to sightings of unidentified flying objects (UFOs). The reports include brief information on the particular sighting, such as where and when the sighting occurred and the individual that reported it.  Each report also includes an individual identification number.  The remaining pages of the reports often include correspondence about the investigation and correspondence from the individual that witnessed the sighting. The records were maintained by the Project Blue Book Office and its predecessor, but there are files relating to the Air Force Office of Special Investigations.
functionAndUse: Air Force staff compiled these records as part of the Air Force study of UFOs called Project Blue Book.   Investigators from districts and commands sent the records to the Air Technical Intelligence Center at Wright Patterson Air Force Base.
